mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application (task_id, applicant_id, status, confirm_publisher, confirm_applicant, create_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{applicantId}, 0, 0, 0, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM application WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM application WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND applicant_id = #{applicantId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 1 AND confirm_publisher = 1 AND confirm_applicant = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE application SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE application SET confirm_publisher = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE application SET confirm_applicant = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
